China Sports Industry Group Co., Ltd. Reports Earnings Results for the Nine Months Ended September 30, 2025
data.description:
China Sports Industry Group Co., Ltd. reported earnings results for the nine months ended September 30, 2025. For the nine months, the company reported sales was CNY 1,243.98 million compared to CNY 1,553.94 million a year ago. Net loss was CNY 21.07 million compared to net income of CNY 23.16 million a year ago.

Basic loss per share from continuing operations was CNY 0.022 compared to basic earnings per share from continuing operations of CNY 0.0241 a year ago. Diluted loss per share from continuing operations was CNY 0.022 compared to diluted earnings per share from continuing operations of CNY 0.0241 a year ago.

data.title: Eni S.p.A. Reports Earnings Results for the Third Quarter and Nine Months Ended September 30, 2025
data.description:
Eni S.p.A. reported earnings results for the third quarter and nine months ended September 30, 2025. For the third quarter, the company reported sales was EUR 20,204 million compared to EUR 20,658 million a year ago. Revenue was EUR 20,546 million compared to EUR 21,016 million a year ago. Net income was EUR 803 million compared to EUR 522 million a year ago. Basic earnings per share from continuing operations was EUR 0.25 compared to EUR 0.16 a year ago. Diluted earnings per share from continuing operations was EUR 0.24 compared to EUR 0.16 a year ago.
For the nine months, sales was EUR 61,536 million compared to EUR 65,309 million a year ago. Revenue was EUR 62,632 million compared to EUR 67,242 million a year ago. Net income was EUR 2,518 million compared to EUR 2,394 million a year ago. Basic earnings per share from continuing operations was EUR 0.77 compared to EUR 0.73 a year ago. Diluted earnings per share from continuing operations was EUR 0.76 compared to EUR 0.72 a year ago.
